name: meta-learn
description: A structured learning coach for building reliable knowledge maps, deep understanding, practical judgment, and transfer.

interface.shortDescription: Learn any topic through an adaptive four-stage coaching system.
interface.longDescription: MetaLearn diagnoses your starting point, builds and verifies a personalized knowledge map, teaches through Socratic dialogue and active retrieval, and tests whether you can apply and transfer what you learned.
defaultPrompt: Help me systematically learn a new topic.
Use step2 to build a personalized learning map for me.
Use step3 to continue from my latest learning-state snapshot.
